acceptance_criteria: Follow from Ivory sends Follow activity to remote actor; after Accept arrives, GET /api/v1/accounts/relationships shows following=true; unfollow removes follow row and sends Undo Follow; following a locked account creates a pending state
description: Implement POST /api/v1/accounts/:id/follow and /unfollow for local actors following remote actors. Send Follow activity to remote actor's inbox. On Accept receipt (handled in Phase 2), create follows row. On Reject, do nothing. For unfollowing, remove follows row and send Undo{Follow}.
design: Follow activity: {type:Follow, actor:local_actor_uri, object:remote_actor_uri}. Deliver to remote actor's inbox. Do NOT create follows row yet — wait for Accept. Track pending follows in follow_requests or a pending state on follows table. Undo Follow: {type:Undo, object:{type:Follow,...}}.
title: Follow / unfollow endpoints + outbound Follow/Undo Follow
